---
title: "Methodology"
---

::: {.page-intro}
[Approach and workflow]{.muted-label}

This page summarizes the datasets, analysis focus, and workflow used in the project.
:::

```{=html}
<section class="section-card methodology-card">
  <h2>Data Sources</h2>
  <p class="methodology-lead">The project uses four core files to describe the music knowledge graph, its entities, and its relationships.</p>

  <div class="source-grid">
    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Raw graph</span>
      <h3>MC1_graph.json</h3>
      <p>Complete graph of artists, genres, releases, and links.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Edges table</span>
      <h3>mc1_edges.csv</h3>
      <p>Relationship table for collaborations, influence, and band links.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Nodes table</span>
      <h3>mc1_nodes.csv</h3>
      <p>Entity table for artists, bands, releases, genres, and attributes.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Reference doc</span>
      <h3>VAST 2025 MC1 Data Description.docx</h3>
      <p>Schema reference for file structure, fields, node types, and edge types.</p>
    </article>
  </div>

  <a class="drive-card" href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1mfKNpFC0zFvP9mVG6L05X8QQdNyGdFnq?usp=drive_link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <span class="drive-icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 87.3 78" role="img" focusable="false">
        <path fill="#0F9D58" d="M6.6 67.5 30.7 25.8h20.9L27.5 67.5z"/>
        <path fill="#FFC107" d="M56.6 67.5H27.5l24.1-41.7h29.1z"/>
        <path fill="#1976D2" d="M46.7 10.5 70.8 52.2 56.6 67.5 32.5 25.8z"/>
      </svg>
    </span>
    <span class="drive-card-copy">
      <span class="drive-card-label">Google Drive Repository</span>
      <span class="drive-card-title">Open shared project folder</span>
      <span class="drive-card-text">Access the dataset directory, supporting files, and working materials for the project.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
</section>

<section class="section-card methodology-card">
  <h2>Analysis Approach</h2>
  <p class="methodology-lead">The analytical focus is organized into five linked studies. Click each item to expand the scope, purpose, and supporting tasks.</p>

  <div class="accordion proposal-accordion methodology-accordion" id="methodologyAnalysisAccordion">
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h3 class="accordion-header" id="analysisOneHeading">
        <button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#analysisOne" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="analysisOne">
          <span class="objective-number">01</span>
          <span>Career Trajectory Analysis</span>
        </button>
      </h3>
      <div id="analysisOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby="analysisOneHeading" data-bs-parent="#methodologyAnalysisAccordion">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <p>This analysis examines the temporal development of an artist’s career, including emergence, breakthrough, consolidation, and expansion across time.</p>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">It covers</span>
            <ul>
              <li>release history</li>
              <li>popularity growth</li>
              <li>career phases and timeline shifts</li>
              <li>genre transitions</li>
              <li>major milestones and inflection points</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">This supports</span>
            <div class="analysis-supports">
              <span class="analysis-tag">T1 Characterize Sailor Shift's career trajectory</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">Part of T6 rising star profile</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h3 class="accordion-header" id="analysisTwoHeading">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#analysisTwo" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="analysisTwo">
          <span class="objective-number">02</span>
          <span>Influence and Lineage Analysis</span>
        </button>
      </h3>
      <div id="analysisTwo" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="analysisTwoHeading" data-bs-parent="#methodologyAnalysisAccordion">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <p>This analysis investigates the lineage of artistic influence within the music ecosystem, including both incoming influences that shaped Sailor and outgoing influences that reflect her wider impact.</p>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">It covers</span>
            <ul>
              <li>who influenced Sailor</li>
              <li>who Sailor influenced</li>
              <li>direct and indirect influence paths</li>
              <li>genre-level influence lineage</li>
              <li>changes in influence across career phases</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">This supports</span>
            <div class="analysis-supports">
              <span class="analysis-tag">T2 Trace incoming and outgoing influence</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">Part of T4 diffusion</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">Part of T5 genre evolution</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h3 class="accordion-header" id="analysisThreeHeading">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#analysisThree" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="analysisThree">
          <span class="objective-number">03</span>
          <span>Collaboration and Network Analysis</span>
        </button>
      </h3>
      <div id="analysisThree" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="analysisThreeHeading" data-bs-parent="#methodologyAnalysisAccordion">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <p>This analysis examines how collaboration networks, band affiliations, and production relationships contribute to artist visibility, career momentum, and cross-community influence.</p>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">It covers</span>
            <ul>
              <li>collaborators</li>
              <li>bandmate relationships</li>
              <li>producers and industry ties</li>
              <li>network centrality</li>
              <li>bridging across genres or communities</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">This supports</span>
            <div class="analysis-supports">
              <span class="analysis-tag">T3 Role of collaboration</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">Part of T6 rising star profile</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">Part of T7 future stars</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h3 class="accordion-header" id="analysisFourHeading">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#analysisFour" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="analysisFour">
          <span class="objective-number">04</span>
          <span>Genre Diffusion and Evolution Analysis</span>
        </button>
      </h3>
      <div id="analysisFour" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="analysisFourHeading" data-bs-parent="#methodologyAnalysisAccordion">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <p>This analysis explores the outward diffusion of Oceanus Folk across artists and genres, as well as the inward evolution of the genre under changing cultural and commercial conditions.</p>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">It covers</span>
            <ul>
              <li>spread of Oceanus Folk across the music world</li>
              <li>whether diffusion was gradual or bursty</li>
              <li>which genres and artists were most influenced</li>
              <li>how Oceanus Folk changed over time</li>
              <li>incoming inspirations into contemporary Oceanus Folk</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">This supports</span>
            <div class="analysis-supports">
              <span class="analysis-tag">T4 diffusion of Oceanus Folk</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">T5 evolution of Oceanus Folk</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h3 class="accordion-header" id="analysisFiveHeading">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#analysisFive" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="analysisFive">
          <span class="objective-number">05</span>
          <span>Emerging Artist and Rising Star Analysis</span>
        </button>
      </h3>
      <div id="analysisFive" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="analysisFiveHeading" data-bs-parent="#methodologyAnalysisAccordion">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <p>This analysis identifies the characteristics associated with breakout success by comparing artist trajectories, network patterns, and influence dynamics across the Oceanus Folk ecosystem.</p>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">It covers</span>
            <ul>
              <li>features that define a rising star</li>
              <li>comparison of selected artists</li>
              <li>momentum indicators</li>
              <li>identification of promising future Oceanus Folk artists</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="analysis-block">
            <span class="source-label">This supports</span>
            <div class="analysis-supports">
              <span class="analysis-tag">T6 rising star profile</span>
              <span class="analysis-tag">T7 forecast future stars</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section-card methodology-card">
  <h2>Tools and Workflow</h2>
  <p class="methodology-lead">The workflow links source data, network analysis, and presentation into a single project pipeline.</p>

  <div class="methodology-step-grid">
    <article class="methodology-step">
      <span class="source-label">Step 01</span>
      <h3>Source review</h3>
      <p>Inspect the graph files and schema reference to understand entities, relationships, and coverage.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="methodology-step">
      <span class="source-label">Step 02</span>
      <h3>Focused analysis</h3>
      <p>Study trajectory, influence, collaboration, and genre spread through targeted network views.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="methodology-step">
      <span class="source-label">Step 03</span>
      <h3>Project delivery</h3>
      <p>Document methods and communicate findings through the Quarto website and project poster.</p>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```
